home.platform_desc: Alpha Trip is an all-in-one platform for managing global meetups and business trips. From meetup registration to flight & hotel booking, on-site vehicle dispatch, food delivery, and real-time translation — handle every aspect of your business trip with Alpha Trip.
home.platform_desc2: We provide role-specific dashboards for organizers, agencies, partners, drivers, interpreters, and more for efficient collaboration. With USDT payment support, 19-language real-time translation, and AI chatbot, experience global business without language barriers.
home.feat1_desc: Easily register for meetups, and team schedules are automatically created upon approval. Get real-time notifications when team members join for quick communication.
home.feat2_desc: Search and book flights, trains, express buses, and hotels in one place. Check your assigned transport and accommodation details in real-time.
home.feat3_desc: Use dedicated vehicle dispatch and food delivery services after arriving at the venue. Drivers manage real-time dispatch status through their dedicated dashboard.
home.feat4_desc: Break language barriers with AI real-time translation in 19 languages and voice recognition. Record important notes instantly during your trip with the memo feature.
home.feat5_desc: Share meeting locations and times via calendar with team members, and communicate smoothly through team announcements and real-time chat. Team schedules are auto-created when registering for meetups.
home.feat6_desc: Optimized dedicated screens for each role — attendees, organizers, drivers, interpreters, agencies, and partners. See only the information you need at a glance.
org_home.step1_desc: Create a new meetup with date, location, and capacity

org_home.no_meetup_desc: Create a meetup to automate attendee invitations, flight/hotel assignments, and on-site management.
org_home.goto_backoffice_desc: 33 management menus for attendees, flights, hotels, schedules, and more

appInstall.iosDoneDesc: Alpha Trip icon will be added to your home screen. Tap it to use like an app!
appInstall.desktopStep1: Open this page in Chrome or Edge browser
appInstall.desktopStep2: Click the install icon on the right side of the address bar
appInstall.desktopStep2Hint: A monitor+arrow icon appears on the right side of the address bar
appInstall.desktopStep3Desc: Click 'Install' in the popup to install as a desktop app.
appInstall.desktopDoneDesc: You can launch Alpha Trip from your desktop or app list.
appInstall.faq1Q: Is this different from downloading from the app store?
appInstall.faq1A: Alpha Trip is a PWA (Progressive Web App) that can be installed directly from your web browser without an app store. It provides the same experience as a native app while using less storage space.
appInstall.faq2A: Just like any app, long-press the icon to delete, or remove it from Settings > Apps.
appInstall.faq3Q: Does it use a lot of data?
appInstall.faq3A: Initial installation uses only about 5MB of data. After that, cached data enables fast loading.

meetupShare.templateSummaryDesc: Key info at a glance: schedule, location, capacity
meetupShare.templateEventDesc: Short impactful text for SNS sharing
meetupShare.inviteTitle: You are invited to a meetup!
meetupShare.inviteBody1: Hello! We are looking for people to join the meetup below.
meetupShare.inviteBody2: If interested, please apply through the link below!
meetupShare.aiBody1: This meetup offers global networking and business opportunities.
